title: Label Workflow Setup
instruction: Set up a label workflow for the new project. Create three labels: 'Project Alpha', 'Needs Review', and 'Client Feedback'. Then search for emails from client.test and apply the 'Client Feedback' label to each. Search for emails with 'review' in the subject and apply the 'Needs Review' label to each. Apply the 'Project Alpha' label to all project-related emails — the ones from client.test and the review emails. Then go to Settings > Labels and set 'Project Alpha' to show if unread, and set 'Client Feedback' to hidden. Finally, remove the 'Needs Review' label from the email about 'Book review for leisure reading club' — it was mislabeled.

resolved_targets.wrong_review_subject: Book review for leisure reading club

Thanks,
Maya

Thanks,
Avery
